plugins.prepareCmd: WORKSPACE=$(pwd) && sed -i 's/Version: [0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+/Version: ${nextRelease.version}/g' style.css && npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version && mkdir -p /tmp/laao-pkg/laao && rsync -a --exclude='.git' --exclude='.github' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='vendor' --exclude='src' --exclude='tests' --exclude='phpunit.xml' --exclude='phpcs.xml.dist' --exclude='webpack.assets.config.mjs' --exclude='webpack.config.mjs' --exclude='composer.json' --exclude='composer.lock' --exclude='pnpm-lock.yaml' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='postcss.config.js' --exclude='tailwind.config.js' --exclude='commitlint.config.js' --exclude='.releaserc.json' --exclude='.husky' --exclude='.gitignore' --exclude='.editorconfig' --exclude='.phpunit.result.cache' --exclude='.cursorrules' --exclude='.eslintrc' --exclude='.prettierrc.js' --exclude='.stylelintignore' --exclude='.stylelintrc.json' --exclude='.claude' --exclude='.vscode' . /tmp/laao-pkg/laao/ && cd /tmp/laao-pkg && zip -r laao.zip laao/ && mv laao.zip $WORKSPACE/
